subcodes.first_line: O 'Ali-Qabli-Akbar! I make mention of thee from My Most Great Prison, that thou mayest hear My call and find thyself in sublime joy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی قبل اکبر انا نذکرک من شطر منظری الأکبر لتسمع ندائی و تجد نفسک فی فرح عظیم
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @high station of the true believer
